Significant differences in depth, specificity, and analytical rigor.

However, Agent_1 provides comprehensive analysis with specific cost calculations, detailed effort breakdowns, and thorough validation methodology, while Agent_2 acknowledges limitations due to missing environment details and provides high-level estimates only. The semantic intent is aligned but execution depth differs significantly.
